description_en: Malacca, in Malaysia, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.5/5. Muslim travelers will find 26 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
